idea: Freight Rail Car Utilization Collapse Signals Logistics Downturn

data.source: Association of American Railroads weekly freight car availability and utilization through html_table adapter

behavior: Railroad freight car utilization drops sharply when industrial demand weakens, signaling recession pressure on logistics and manufacturing. Weekly AAR reports are consistent and predictable.

market_impact.rationale: Low freight utilization precedes industrial slowdown and manufacturing contraction, directly impacting industrial equipment and transportation stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly freight car utilization falls more than 8% below its 12-week moving average, enter short.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when utilization rebounds to within 3% of 12-week MA.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight utilization swings 8%+ several times per quarter in normal economic cycles, making it a frequent signal generator.

idea: Commercial Real Estate Vacancy Spike Bearish Signal

data.source: CoStar or CBRE weekly commercial vacancy rate data through html_table adapter

behavior: Weekly CRE vacancy announcements and market reports often spike when major tenant departures or defaults occur, signaling real estate distress and reducing property valuations.

market_impact.rationale: Rising CRE vacancy directly compresses real estate fundamentals, cap rates, and investor returns in the real estate sector.

trade_logic.entry: If reported CRE vacancy rate rises 0.5% or more week-over-week in any major metro, short XLRE.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 12 trading days or when weekly vacancy stabilizes.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: CRE vacancies fluctuate weekly and 0.5%+ moves occur multiple times per quarter as tenants relocate or default.

idea: College Application Volume Collapse Signals Education Demand Crisis

data.source: Common App weekly application submission totals through html_table adapter from public reports

behavior: Dramatic drops in college application volumes during peak application season signal demographic or affordability collapse, reducing future revenue for education services and related consumer spending.

market_impact.rationale: Lower application volumes signal weakening middle-class household formation, future discretionary spending, and consumer confidence in education ROI.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Common App submissions fall 15% or more below the prior-year same week, short XLY.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 8 trading days or when submissions recover to prior-year levels.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Common App data is released weekly during application season (Sept–Jan) and 15%+ year-over-year swings happen several times per cycle.

idea: Trucking Load Board Capacity Surge Signals Freight Oversupply

data.source: Truckstop.com and Uber Freight public load board fill-rate indices through html_table or api adapter

behavior: When available loads vastly outnumber available trucks on public load boards, trucking capacity crashes and freight rates collapse, signaling logistics sector weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Trucking oversupply indicates weak shipping demand, depresses carrier margins, and signals industrial slowdown.

trade_logic.entry: If daily load board available-loads-to-trucks ratio rises above 2.0 for 3 consecutive days, short XLI.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when ratio falls below 1.5.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Load board ratios spike and crash weekly based on seasonal and cyclical freight demand, firing multiple times per month.

idea: Temporary Staffing Agency Hiring Collapse Signals Labor Market Deterioration

data.source: ManpowerGroup and Kforce weekly hiring intention indices from earnings call transcripts and press releases through rss_count adapter

behavior: Weekly announcements of collapsed temporary hiring intentions from major staffing agencies precede broader labor market deterioration and consumer spending weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Temp hiring collapse signals companies expect weak demand, reducing consumer spending power and leading to discretionary spending cuts.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly temp hiring intention index falls 12% or more below 3-month MA, short XLY.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when index stabilizes above MA.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Temp hiring swings 12%+ quarterly and reports are published weekly, creating 3–5 signals per quarter.

idea: Mortgage Application Volume Waterfall Signals Housing Demand Collapse

data.source: Mortgage Bankers Association weekly applications index through html_table adapter

behavior: Sharp week-over-week drops in mortgage applications signal housing demand evaporates due to rate shocks or affordability crisis, impacting construction, materials, and consumer sentiment.

market_impact.rationale: Mortgage application collapses reduce demand for construction materials, lumber, and finished housing inventory.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly mortgage applications fall 20% or more below prior week, short XLB for 10 days.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when applications stabilize.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Mortgage applications swing 20%+ weekly due to rate announcements and seasonal factors, firing 2–4 times per month.

idea: Natural Gas Storage Injection Collapse Signals Energy Demand Shock

data.source: EIA weekly natural gas storage updates through fred_series adapter

behavior: When weekly natural gas storage injections plummet (or turn to unexpected draws), it signals either demand spike or supply shock, creating energy price volatility and sector stress.

market_impact.rationale: Unexpected storage draws or injection collapses support energy prices and create near-term energy sector gains from price recovery.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly EIA gas storage injection falls below historical 5-year minimum for that week by 50% or more, go long XLE.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 8 trading days or when injection rebounds to normal levels.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gas storage swings 50%+ vs. seasonal norms occur 4–8 times per year, particularly in winter and summer transition periods.

idea: Credit Card Processing Volume Plunge Signals Consumer Spending Halt

data.source: Visa and Mastercard weekly transaction volume indices through html_table or rss_count adapter from earnings/investor updates

behavior: Sharp drops in credit card transaction volumes precede broader consumer spending collapses and signal immediate consumer confidence crisis.

market_impact.rationale: Spending volume collapse directly compresses revenue for retail, hospitality, and consumer discretionary companies.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly credit card transaction volume falls 15% or more below 4-week MA, short XLY.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when volume recovers to MA.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Credit card volumes experience 15%+ swings quarterly due to seasonal patterns and economic shocks, creating 2–4 monthly signals.

idea: Copper Futures Volatility Spike Signals Risk-Off Macro Repricing

data.source: Copper futures daily prices and 20-day volatility through price_only adapter

behavior: Copper volatility spikes often precede broad industrial and emerging market stress, as copper is a leading macroeconomic risk proxy due to its use in construction and manufacturing.

market_impact.rationale: High copper volatility signals macro uncertainty, reducing industrial capex and equipment demand.

trade_logic.entry: If 20-day copper futures volatility rises 40% or more above its 60-day MA, short XLI.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when copper volatility mean-reverts below MA + 20%.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Copper volatility swings 40%+ on macro headlines and Fed announcements 2–4 times per month.

idea: Regional Bank CDS Spread Widening Signals Financial System Stress

data.source: FRED regional bank CDS indices (5-year spreads) and daily price tracking through fred_series adapter

behavior: When regional bank credit default swap spreads widen sharply, it signals market-perceived stress in the mid-sized financial system, often preceding credit market seizures or deposit runs.

market_impact.rationale: CDS spread widening indicates markets price higher default risk for regional banks, compressing equity valuations and reducing lending.

trade_logic.entry: If daily regional bank CDS spread widens 30+ basis points in a single day or rises 50+ bps over 5 days, short XLF.
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 8 trading days or when spreads contract 20+ bps.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Regional bank CDS spreads experience 30+ bps daily moves during periods of financial uncertainty, which occur multiple times per quarter.
